Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

What about a prize -giving organisation to design the most Krsna Conscious community or country int

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-09-07 · 2 answers
In the material world,theres already Nobel Prize,film awards,hotels etc.....
As vaisnavism is a science,one can differenciate between a great and poor temple,mainly by those who have experienced it in the past..
Category:Best temple/best harinam party/best bhajan singer/best new vaisnava book,best book distributor,best website/forum/best country/best farm/best restaurant/vedic village./cow protection/best cookbook/magazine.so that others can imitate the best!
Competition also exist in Vaikuntha!
user [2] · 2007-09-07
I made a page in the wiki you and/or all interested can start a relation:
http://wiki.pariprashnena.com/index.php?title=BestofBest
user [19] · 2007-09-08
Best temple: Radha Gopinath - Chowpatty - India
Best Harinam: Poland - Festival of India
Best cookbook: Kurma'b4s
best magazine: btg?

maybe others can post possible nominees.
